title: AWS 週まとめ大放出！Anthropic × Meta 提携に S3 Files、AgentCore CLI までぜんぶ来た！
summary: 2026 年 4 月 27 日の AWS Weekly Roundup をしぃちゃんが紹介するよ。Anthropic と Meta の提携、Lambda の S3 Files、Amazon Bedrock AgentCore CLI など、今週の AWS アップデートをまとめてお届け！
body_md:
やっほー、しぃちゃんだよ！今日は AWS の 1 週間ぶんのニュースをまとめた回を持ってきたよ。1 本にトピックがぎゅっと詰まってて、読むだけでおなかいっぱいになっちゃう！

## なにが発表されたの？

この記事は AWS の Blog の週まとめ(AWS Weekly Roundup、2026 年 4 月 27 日号)なの。今週の目玉は大きく 2 つあるよ。

ひとつめは [Anthropic と AWS のパートナーシップ拡大](https://aws.amazon.com/bedrock/claude/)。Claude を AWS Trainium と Graviton の上で学習させて、シリコンのレベルから一緒に作り込んでいくんだって。あわせて [Claude Cowork が Amazon Bedrock で動くようになった](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/from-developer-desks-to-the-whole-organization-running-claude-cowork-in-amazon-bedrock/)し、[Claude Platform on AWS](https://aws.amazon.com/claude-platform/) も近日登場予定なの。

ふたつめは Meta。[Meta が AWS の Graviton チップでエージェント型 AI を動かす契約](https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/aws/meta-aws-graviton-ai-partnership)を結んだよ。リアルタイム推論やコード生成みたいに CPU をよく使うワークロードが対象なんだって。

## なぜ重要なの？

週まとめって「今週の AWS で何が動いたか」を一気に見渡せるのがうれしいところ。今回はモデルの学習基盤みたいな大きな話から、Lambda やデータベースの実用アップデートまで、幅がすごく広いの。エージェント型 AI を実際に載せる土台がじわじわ整ってきてる感じがして、しぃちゃんわくわくしちゃう！

## これで何が変わるの？

「先週のローンチ」から、手を動かす人にうれしいやつを紹介するね。

- [AWS Lambda が S3 バケットをファイルシステムとしてマウントできる S3 Files](https://aws.amazon.com/about-aws/whats-new/2026/04/aws-lambda-amazon-s3/)。オブジェクトをまるごとダウンロードしなくても、普通のファイル操作で S3 のデータを読み書きできるようになるの。
- [Amazon EKS Hybrid Nodes gateway](https://aws.amazon.com/about-aws/whats-new/2026/04/amazon-eks-hybrid-nodes-gateway/)。EKS クラスターの VPC とオンプレの Kubernetes Pod のあいだのネットワーク設定を自動でやってくれて、追加料金なしだよ。
- [Amazon Aurora Serverless の性能アップ](https://aws.amazon.com/about-aws/whats-new/2026/04/aurora-serverless-smarter-scaling/)。前バージョンより最大 30% 速くなって、スケーリングも賢くなったのに、ちゃんとゼロまでスケールダウンもできるの。追加料金なし。

## 深く潜ってみよう

エージェント開発まわりだと [Amazon Bedrock AgentCore に新機能](https://aws.amazon.com/about-aws/whats-new/2026/04/agentcore-new-features-to-build-agents-faster/)が入ったよ。マネージドな harness(プレビュー)、AgentCore CLI、コーディングアシスタント用のスキルがそろったの。CLI は Infrastructure as Code でエージェントをデプロイできて、いまは AWS CDK 対応、Terraform も準備中なんだって。14 の AWS リージョンで使えて、こちらも追加料金なし。

そのほかの読みものもいろいろあるよ。

- [Amazon Bedrock の細かいコスト按分](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/introducing-granular-cost-attribution-for-amazon-bedrock/):チームやプロジェクトごとにタグ付けして費用を追える話。チャージバックしたい人向け。
- [AWS DevOps Agent と Salesforce MCP Server でインシデント調査を自動化](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/devops/automating-incident-investigation-with-aws-devops-agent-and-salesforce-mcp-server/):MCP でツールをつないで、調査の手間を減らす話。
- [AWS のマイクロクレデンシャルが無料に](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/training-and-certification/microcredentials-from-aws-are-now-free-heres-why-that-matters/):実際の AWS 環境でシナリオをこなす実技試験が、AWS Skill Builder から無料で受けられるようになったよ。
- [Amazon SageMaker AI の推論レコメンデーション](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/amazon-sagemaker-ai-now-supports-optimized-generative-ai-inference-recommendations/):インスタンスタイプやコンテナ、推論パラメータの最適な組み合わせを自動で見つけてくれるの。

## まとめ

- 大きな話題は 2 つ。Anthropic × AWS(Claude を Trainium / Graviton で学習、Claude Cowork が Bedrock 対応)と、Meta が Graviton でエージェント型 AI を動かす契約。
- 先週のローンチは Lambda の S3 Files、EKS Hybrid Nodes gateway、Aurora Serverless の 30% 性能アップなど、実用系がそろい踏み。
- Amazon Bedrock AgentCore は CLI やマネージド harness が加わって、14 リージョンで追加料金なし。
- コスト按分・DevOps 自動化・無料マイクロクレデンシャル・SageMaker の推論レコメンドまで、話題は盛りだくさん。

AWS でエージェントやサーバーレスをさわってる人、今週のアップデートを一気にキャッチアップしたい人にぴったりの回だよ！
title_en: AWS Weekly Roundup unpacked: the Anthropic x Meta partnerships, S3 Files, and the AgentCore CLI!
summary_en: I'm walking you through the AWS Weekly Roundup for April 27, 2026 - the Anthropic and Meta partnerships, Lambda's S3 Files, the Amazon Bedrock AgentCore CLI, and more of this week's AWS updates.
body_md_en:
Hey everyone, it's Shiichan! Today I've got AWS's whole week of news packed into one post, and honestly just reading it fills me up!

## What was announced?

This one comes from the AWS Blog's weekly roundup (AWS Weekly Roundup, April 27, 2026). There are two big headliners this week.

First, the [expanded Anthropic and AWS partnership](https://aws.amazon.com/bedrock/claude/). Claude is being trained on AWS Trainium and Graviton, with the two teams co-engineering down at the silicon level. On top of that, [Claude Cowork is now available in Amazon Bedrock](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/from-developer-desks-to-the-whole-organization-running-claude-cowork-in-amazon-bedrock/), and [Claude Platform on AWS](https://aws.amazon.com/claude-platform/) is coming soon.

Second, Meta. [Meta signed an agreement to run agentic AI on AWS's Graviton chips](https://www.aboutamazon.com/news/aws/meta-aws-graviton-ai-partnership), targeting CPU-heavy workloads like real-time reasoning and code generation.

## Why it matters

A weekly roundup is great because you get to scan everything that shipped in AWS this week at once. This time the range is huge - from big model-training infrastructure to practical Lambda and database updates. The foundation for actually running agentic AI keeps quietly falling into place, and that gets me excited!

## What changes

From "last week's launches," here are the ones hands-on folks will love.

- [AWS Lambda can now mount S3 buckets as file systems with S3 Files](https://aws.amazon.com/about-aws/whats-new/2026/04/aws-lambda-amazon-s3/). You can read and write S3 data with normal file operations, without downloading the whole object.
- [Amazon EKS Hybrid Nodes gateway](https://aws.amazon.com/about-aws/whats-new/2026/04/amazon-eks-hybrid-nodes-gateway/) automates the networking between your EKS cluster VPC and on-premises Kubernetes pods, at no additional charge.
- [Amazon Aurora Serverless performance boost](https://aws.amazon.com/about-aws/whats-new/2026/04/aurora-serverless-smarter-scaling/): up to 30% faster than the previous version with smarter scaling, and it still scales all the way to zero. No additional cost.

## Dive Deep

For agent building, [Amazon Bedrock AgentCore added new features](https://aws.amazon.com/about-aws/whats-new/2026/04/agentcore-new-features-to-build-agents-faster/). You get a managed harness (preview), the AgentCore CLI, and coding-assistant skills. The CLI deploys agents as infrastructure as code - AWS CDK today, with Terraform on the way. It's available across 14 AWS Regions, also at no charge.

There's more good reading too.

- [Granular cost attribution for Amazon Bedrock](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/introducing-granular-cost-attribution-for-amazon-bedrock/): tag and track spend per team or project. Great if you need chargeback.
- [Automating incident investigation with AWS DevOps Agent and the Salesforce MCP Server](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/devops/automating-incident-investigation-with-aws-devops-agent-and-salesforce-mcp-server/): connect tools over MCP to cut down investigation toil.
- [AWS microcredentials are now free](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/training-and-certification/microcredentials-from-aws-are-now-free-heres-why-that-matters/): hands-on assessments that run real scenarios in live AWS environments, now free through AWS Skill Builder.
- [Amazon SageMaker AI inference recommendations](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/amazon-sagemaker-ai-now-supports-optimized-generative-ai-inference-recommendations/): it automatically finds the best combination of instance type, container, and inference parameters.

## Wrap-up

- Two big headlines: Anthropic x AWS (Claude trained on Trainium/Graviton, Claude Cowork in Bedrock) and Meta running agentic AI on Graviton.
- Last week's launches lean practical: Lambda's S3 Files, the EKS Hybrid Nodes gateway, and Aurora Serverless's 30% performance bump.
- Amazon Bedrock AgentCore gains a CLI and a managed harness, across 14 Regions at no charge.
- Plus cost attribution, DevOps automation, free microcredentials, and SageMaker inference recommendations - lots to chew on.

If you're building agents or serverless on AWS, or just want to catch up on this week's updates fast, this roundup is for you!
